question: Main.md says production build_date must follow calibration production_release_date. Compare the earliest production lot build date to the earliest calibration release date. Is any production lot earlier than the earliest calibration release, and which rows establish this?
answer:
Yes, the earliest production lot build date (2024-01-01) is earlier than the earliest calibration production_release_date (2024-01-02). This violates the rule in Main.md that states production build_date must follow calibration production_release_date.

Rows establishing this:
• LOT-00363 from production_quality_measurements has build_date = 2024-01-01 (earliest production lot)
• CAL-00701 from powertrain_calibration_specs has production_release_date = 2024-01-02 (earliest calibration release)

Since 2024-01-01 < 2024-01-02, production lot LOT-00363 was built one day before the earliest calibration release date.
